text: Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden welcome third child - CNN
fullText: Hollywood star Cameron Diaz and her musician husband Benji Madden have annouced the birth of their third child, a boy named Nautas.

text: Why Leclerc was hit with a penalty after Miami GP - Formula 1
fullText: Charles Leclerc endured a rollercoaster Miami Grand Prix on Sunday, as the Ferrari driver went from a potential podium finish to being classified eighth after a dramatic last-lap spin and post-race penalty. But why was Leclerc penalised? And what rule was bro…

text: Germany news: Merz plays down US military withdrawal plans - DW.com
fullText: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has said a US threat to pull troops out of Germany is "nothing new." Meanwhile, Germany’s interior minister says border controls will stay despite falling asylum numbers. DW has more.

In many states, election-denying candidates are running to control voting - NPR
fullText: In 23 states, including five presidential swing states, candidates who have denied election results are running for offices that have a direct role in certifying future elections, a new report finds.

text: New bill aims to stop 'claim sharks' from targeting disabled vets after NPR investigation - NPR
fullText: The bipartisan bill would block companies from using auto-dialers to harvest private information about disabled veterans. The firms charge vets for a service lawmakers say is supposed to be free.

text: After Republicans blocked Indiana redistricting, millions poured in to defeat them - NPR
fullText: President Trump has thrown his support behind challengers to Republican state senators who opposed his redistricting push.
